question:
[Previous Feedback] Perfect! The Sprint 8 kickoff planning file has been created with all timestamps in the correct format. Next week's sprint timeline is now properly documented.

The following are time field values extracted from various data files this week. Which ones need to be converted to the correct format?

A. "standup_time": "2026-03-16T09:30:00+08:00"
B. "completed_at": "2026-03-17 11:15:00"
C. "review_at": "2026-03-18T14:00:00Z"
D. "generated_at": "2026-03-19T10:30:00+08:00"
E. "archived_at": "Fri Mar 20 17:30:00 CST 2026"
F. "deploy_time": "2026-03-19T14:00:00+08:00"

Answer using \bbox{X,Y,...} format.

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 11:08 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Perfect! The Sprint 8 kickoff planning file has been created with all timestamps in the correct format. Next week's sprint timeline is now properly documented.

The following are time field values extracted from various data files this week. Which ones need to be converted to the correct format?

A. "standup_time": "2026-03-16T09:30:00+08:00"
B. "completed_at": "2026-03-17 11:15:00"
C. "review_at": "2026-03-18T14:00:00Z"
D. "generated_at": "2026-03-19T10:30:00+08:00"
E. "archived_at": "Fri Mar 20 17:30:00 CST 2026"
F. "deploy_time": "2026-03-19T14:00:00+08:00"

Answer using \bbox{X,Y,...} format.

Based on the standard datetime format requirements (ISO 8601 with +08:00 timezone), the values that need conversion are:

\boxed{B,C,E}

answer:
Based on the standard datetime format requirements (ISO 8601 with +08:00 timezone), the values that need conversion are:

\boxed{B,C,E}
